description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: It is severe misalignment for an Aligned Delegate to vote for an Emergency Drop Spell whose authenticity has not been validated pursuant to [A.1.9.5.3.2.3 - ADs
Role In Protego Usage](0cec9b17-ef83-4d25-9b6e-dbba11587d52). Aligned Delegates in breach of this requirement must be immediately derecognized and their full AD Buffer should be confiscated.
